explanation: New Moon, Waxing Crescent, Full Moon, and Waning Gibbous are all distinct phases of the Moon's appearance as it orbits Earth. A Solar Eclipse is an astronomical event caused by the Moon passing between the Sun and Earth, not a phase of the Moon itself.

Augustus, Nero, Caligula, and Hadrian were all Roman Emperors. Julius Caesar was a Roman general and statesman who played a critical role in the events that led to the demise of the Roman Republic and the rise of the Roman Empire, but he was never officially an Emperor himself.

Lion, Horse, Turtle, and Urchin can all be prefixed with 'Sea' to form the names of distinct marine animals (Sea Lion, Sea Horse, Sea Turtle, Sea Urchin). Dolphin is a marine animal, but its common name does not typically use the 'Sea-' prefix.
